source.title: ZTO Reports Fourth Quarter 2025 and Full Year 2025 Unaudited Financial Results

extractions.claim: ZTO Express handled 38.52 billion parcels in full year 2025, up 13.3% YoY
extractions.evidence: ZTO reported a full-year parcel volume of 38.52 billion parcels in 2025, a 13.3% year-over-year increase. The Company grew parcel volume by 4.5 billion, or 13.3% year over year.

verification.verifier_notes: From ZTO's official Q4/FY2025 earnings release dated March 18, 2026

extractions.claim: ZTO Q4 2025 parcel volume was 10.56 billion, up 9.2% YoY with market share expanding 0.8pp
extractions.evidence: ZTO reported parcel volume of 10.56 billion in Q4 2025, up 9.2% year-over-year, and said market share expanded by 0.8 percentage points.

verification.verifier_notes: From ZTO's official Q4/FY2025 earnings release

extractions.claim: ZTO FY2025 revenue was RMB 49.1 billion, up 10.9% YoY; adjusted net income RMB 9.5 billion
extractions.evidence: Total revenue increased 10.9% to CNY 49.1 billion for the year. Adjusted net income reached RMB 9.5 billion. Gross margin declined from 31.0% to 25.0% and operating margin from 26.6% to 21.3%.

verification.verifier_notes: From ZTO's official FY2025 earnings release

extractions.claim: ZTO 2026 guidance: parcel volume to grow 10-13% YoY (42.37B-43.52B parcels)
extractions.evidence: The Company expects its parcel volume for 2026 to increase by 10% to 13% year over year, representing a parcel volume range of 42.37 billion to 43.52 billion.

verification.verifier_notes: From ZTO's official 2026 guidance in Q4 2025 earnings release

extractions.claim: ZTO approved $1.5B share repurchase program over 24 months
extractions.evidence: The board declared a semi-annual cash dividend of US$0.39 per ADS and approved a new share repurchase program of up to US$1.5 billion over 24 months, targeting aggregate annual shareholder returns of at least 50% of prior-year adjusted net income.

source.title: Chinese Express Carrier Parcel Volume Rankings 2024-2025

extractions.claim: YTO Express delivered ~26.6 billion parcels in 2024, ranking #2 behind ZTO with 25.33% growth
extractions.evidence: YTO Express (600233.SH) delivered around 26.6 billion parcels for the year 2024. YTO Express grew by a similarly strong 25.33%.

verification.verifier_notes: From Morningstar and Bamboo Works analysis of carrier results

extractions.claim: Yunda Express delivered ~23.8 billion parcels in 2024, ranking #3 with 26.14% growth
extractions.evidence: Yunda (002120.SZ) was third at 23.8 billion units with growth of 26.14%.

verification.verifier_notes: From Morningstar and Bamboo Works analysis of carrier results

extractions.claim: Top 6 private express carriers handle ~80-82% of China's parcel deliveries by volume
extractions.evidence: The six largest privately owned express delivery companies accounted for around 80% of China's parcel-delivery volume in Q3 2025, based on data from the companies and China's State Post Bureau.

verification.verifier_notes: From Morningstar analyst Chelsey Tam, October 2025

extractions.claim: YTO narrowing market share gap with ZTO; STO leads in revenue growth while Yunda lags
extractions.evidence: As of March 2026, Morningstar notes YTO's parcel volume market share gap has narrowed compared with leader ZTO. STO Express leads revenue growth for China express couriers as Yunda lags behind.
